3297190.name: Tummy Bonbons The Sweet Monster
3297190.description:
Tummy Bonbons The Sweet Monster is a Gameboy-inspired survival game.

Tummy is hungry. They need candy to survive. Luckily, on this beautiful Halloween night, there are tons of children to frighten, with pockets full of precious sweets.

Eat candy. Get spookier. Scare children. Choose new bellies based on their upgrades. Eat more candy! Eat as much as you can!!

But don't bite off more than you can chew! Brave kids and crows will hurt you and steal your sweets. You might well end up starving...

Plays with a keyboard.

Features 3 difficulty modes plus an endless mode, a local leaderboard and color palettes to unlock.
